Assistant Vice President                      
 
                      General Manager 
Listing Department,  
 
 
 
                      Listing Department, 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited,  
 
           BSE Limited, 
Exchange Plaza,  
 
 
 
 
                      Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers,  
Plot No. C/1, G Block, BKC, 
 
 
 
           Dalal Street,  
Bandra (East), Mumbai 400051                                            Mumbai 400001 
NSE Symbol: SBILIFE                                                             BSE Scrip Code: 540719 
 
Dear Sir / Madam,  
 
Subject: Audio Recording - Earnings Calls for Q1 of FY 2023-24 
 
In continuation to our intimation vide ref. no. SBIL/CS/NSE-BSE/2324/75 dated July 20, 
2023, we wish to inform you that pursuant to the provisions of Regulation 30 read with 
Schedule III, Part A, Para A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulations, 2015, the audio recording of the earnings conference call with analysts and 
investors held on July 25, 2023, with respect to the financial results of the Company for 
the quarter ended June 30, 2023, has been hosted on the Company’s website. 
 
Please find below the link of Audio Recording of Earnings Call held on July 25, 2023 with 
analysts/ investors. 
 
https://www.sbilife.co.in/en/about-us/investor-relations 
 
You are requested to kindly take the same on record.  
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully, 
 
 
 
Vinod Koyande 
Company Secretary 
ACS No. 33696 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Vinod Vijay 
Koyande
